choose.when:
WITH RECURSIVE family_ids AS ( SELECT id FROM family WHERE id = #{param.familyId} AND del_flag = 0 UNION ALL SELECT f.id FROM family f INNER JOIN family_ids fi ON f.pid = fi.id WHERE f.del_flag = 0 ) SELECT m.id, m.family_id, m.name, m.relation, m.phone, m.role, m.avatar, m.create_time, f.name AS family_name FROM family_member m LEFT JOIN family f ON f.id = m.family_id AND f.del_flag = 0
AND m.family_id IN (SELECT id FROM family_ids)
AND #{param.familyId} IN (SELECT id FROM family WHERE (founder_id = #{param.currentUserId} OR id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0)) AND del_flag = 0)
AND m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
AND m.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY m.id ASC
choose.otherwise:
SELECT m.id, m.family_id, m.name, m.relation, m.phone, m.role, m.avatar, m.create_time, f.name AS family_name FROM family_member m LEFT JOIN family f ON f.id = m.family_id AND f.del_flag = 0
AND m.family_id IN (SELECT id FROM family WHERE (founder_id = #{param.currentUserId} OR id IN (SELECT family_id FROM family_member WHERE user_id = #{param.currentUserId} AND del_flag = 0)) AND del_flag = 0)
AND m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%')
AND m.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY m.id ASC

mapper.select: SELECT m.role FROM family_member m WHERE m.family_id = #{familyId} AND m.user_id = #{userId} AND m.del_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
